overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open-world game showing a character wearing a poncho and hat traversing an arid desert landscape. The character moves steadily along a dirt path past rock formations and sparse vegetation under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: arid desert trail with prominent mesa formation on left

agents.ego_description: character jogging steadily along the dirt path toward distant rock formations

entered.detail: tall red rock formation with flat top rising from the desert floor
sandy trail winding through the arid landscape
sparse dry bushes and low vegetation lining the path
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an expansive desert landscape under a clear blue sky. A prominent mesa formation dominates the left side of the frame while sparse desert vegetation lines the sandy trail ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trail passing wooden marker with approaching canyon walls

events.description: wooden signpost comes into view on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: character continues past the wooden cross marker toward the rock formations ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden cross marker beside the trail
large layered rock formations and canyon walls ahead

segments.scene_description: The character passes a wooden signpost on the right while approaching larger rock formations. The trail continues through the arid terrain with canyon walls becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain with expansive mountain vistas

events.description: path curves left revealing expansive open desert vista with distant mountain range

agents.ego_description: character continues along the winding trail through the open desert landscape

entered.detail: spiky succulent plants growing beside the trail
expansive flat desert plain stretching to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The trail curves to reveal an expansive open desert vista with distant mountains. Agave plants and desert scrub line the path as the character moves toward the hazy horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an arid desert landscape that gradually opens from a narrow trail into an expansive mountain vista. It begins with the character traversing a sandy path under a clear blue sky, with a prominent mesa formation dominating the left side of the frame. As the character moves forward, the camera passes a wooden signpost on the right and approaches larger rock formations while canyon walls begin to emerge in the distance. The scene then shifts as the trail curves, revealing a wide-open desert expanse dotted with agave plants and scrub. Finally, the perspective expands toward a hazy horizon where distant mountains frame the vast, sun-drenched terrain.
